title: lonchocarpus capassa
intro: Lonchocarpus capassa is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. The Lonchocarpus capassa plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves, bark, and seeds are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as pain relief, improved circulation, and immune system support. In herbal preparations, the Lonchocarpus capassa plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
